introSection: EuroLoop is a steel roller coaster located at Fabrikus World in Vias, Occitanie, France.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Dark blue track and yellow supports. The ride opened with red track and green supports at Mirapolis. The supports where repainted white at Spreepark.

fullText:
EuroLoop is a steel roller coaster located at Fabrikus World in Vias, Occitanie, France.



Dark blue track and yellow supports. The ride opened with red track and green supports at Mirapolis. The supports where repainted white at Spreepark.
